events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete — the staged unshielded rubber coupling is not listed for underground/buried use. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`: standard neoprene couplings lack the rigid shield needed to resist backfill/soil load, so IPC and CISPI 310/ASTM C1277 listings restrict them to exposed, above-grade joints. The buried transition needs a shielded, heavy-duty coupling swapped in before backfilling.
